content.body:
nodeTypeToKind's default case returned raw tree-sitter node types
(e.g. "variable_declarator") which use underscores. These went into
draft tags and failed kebab-case validation during reindex.

Replace underscores with hyphens in the default case.
content.subject: fix(cartographer): sanitise tree-sitter node types to kebab-case tags
